description: A standalone knowledge article (or question/answer/thought). Each standalone article is backed by its own pijul repository; `pijulRepoUrl` is the knot-hosted location so external consumers can clone the authoritative source. Chapters of a series are NOT published as at.nightbo.article records — the series record describes the whole work and the repo's chapter files are the authoritative structure.

pijulRepoUrl.description: Public knot URL hosting the article's pijul repo, e.g. https://knot.example.com/did:web:alice/at___did_web_alice_at.nightbo.article_<tid>
